description: World's largest memory chip manufacturer and second-largest foundry. Produces DRAM, NAND flash, and provides foundry services. Leading in HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) for AI applications. Also manufactures smartphones and displays.

_externalRelationships.notes: 2nm GAA production started. HBM4 nearing NVIDIA certification. Feb 2026 HBM4 mass production. World's 14th most valuable company.

_metadata.notes: Competing with TSMC for advanced foundry. Stock hit record high on HBM4 breakthrough. Memory + Foundry + Consumer electronics.
